clips.title: The Descent
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX, one continuous impossible push-in. Begins on a vast spiral galaxy in deep space, then rushes inward seamlessly and impossibly in a single shot: past swirling stars, down toward a blue planet, through clouds, down to a person standing in a field, into their skin, into a glowing cell, and finally resolving on a spiraling DNA double helix. A person in a field. Epic scale transition, seamless continuous push in, macro-to-cosmic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Thread
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX, one continuous impossible push-in. Starts on a glittering galaxy, then dives inward in one seamless impossible move: through star clusters, toward a planet, down through a city, onto a person on a rooftop, into their hand, into the cellular world, and ending on a luminous rotating DNA strand. A person on a rooftop. Epic scale transition, seamless continuous push in, macro-to-cosmic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Origin
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX, one continuous impossible push-in. Opens on a radiant spiral galaxy, then travels inward endlessly in a single seamless shot: past nebulae, down to a planet, through the atmosphere, to a person by the sea, into their eye, deep into cells and molecules, resolving on a glowing DNA helix. A person by the sea. Epic scale transition, seamless continuous push in, macro-to-cosmic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Weave
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX, one continuous impossible push-in. Begins on a distant galaxy, then plunges inward in one impossible seamless move: through drifting stars, down to a snowy planet, to a person in a winter landscape, into their skin, into the microscopic world of cells, ending on a shimmering DNA double helix. A person in snow. Epic scale transition, seamless continuous push in, macro-to-cosmic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Spiral
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX, one continuous impossible push-in. Starts on the swirling arm of a galaxy, then rushes inward seamlessly: past suns, down toward a planet, through clouds to a person in a desert, into their hand, into a single cell, resolving on a glowing rotating DNA strand. A person in a desert. Epic scale transition, seamless continuous push in, macro-to-cosmic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Code
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX, one continuous impossible push-in. Opens on a luminous galaxy, then dives inward in a single impossible shot: through star fields, down to a planet, into a city street, onto a person, into their skin, through cells and molecules, ending on a brightly glowing DNA double helix. A person on a street. Epic scale transition, seamless continuous push in, macro-to-cosmic, 24fps.
